title: BioinfoUNIBA/REDItools: The REDItools family of scripts for RNA editing detection v1.0
author: Claudio Lo Giudice
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: REDItools is a software package including Python scripts for detecting RNA editing in deep transcriptome datasets. It comprises three main releases. V3 is the latest with optimized code to handle a large number of RNAseq datasets.
steps_raw: REDItools is a software package including Python scripts for detecting RNA editing in deep transcriptome datasets. It comprises three main releases. V3 is the latest with optimized code to handle a large number of RNAseq datasets.
